summary:
INVESTIGATIVE JOURNALISM AND POLITICAL LEADERSHIP: Brandon discusses visions regarding the protection of Benny Johnson and Nick Shirley, specifically focusing on their investigative reporting concerning political corruption in California. Brandon states that President Trump is currently in a critical valley of decision phase where his choices over the next few weeks will define his presidency. He shares visions of aquatic-like demonic spirits attempting to cause confusion in the Oval Office through the counsel of ungodly individuals. Brandon draws a parallel between President Trump and Ronald Reagan, predicting a moment similar to the fall of the Berlin Wall that will impact the current global political landscape and eventually lead to the liberation of Cuba.

GEOPOLITICAL SHIFTS AND MILITARY FORECASTS: Brandon outlines several upcoming international developments, including critical meetings in Turkey concerning the future of Iran and the potential collapse of current Iranian regimes, which he connects to the weakening of groups like Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis. He discusses reports of a military coup in China aimed at ousting Xi Jinping, which Brandon claims will create a protective hedge over Taiwan. Furthermore, he anticipates the removal of Kim Jong-un and his sister in North Korea. Brandon also foresees upcoming financial shakings affecting global markets, specifically referencing drops in silver prices and the imminent financial collapse of the United Nations, aligning these events with past predictions made by Kim Clement.

DOMESTIC EVENTS AND ANTICIPATED LEAKS: Brandon warns that upcoming protests at major events like the Super Bowl and the Olympics are orchestrated distractions meant to divert public attention from the exposure of elitists involved in the Epstein list. He asserts that a hacker group akin to Anonymous, or a new Edward Snowden, will soon release highly embarrassing secrets and blackmail material concerning the Democratic Party and prominent sports figures. Brandon emphasizes that these exposures will reveal deep-rooted corruption across various political spheres, extending far beyond the surface-level investigations currently taking place in states like California, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND NATURAL PHENOMENA: Brandon details impending natural disasters, including an active volcano off the coast of Oregon and major earthquakes poised to strike the Ring of Fire and Japan. He states that ancient monkey temples and dragon structures in India will crumble in seconds as a sign of massive global shifts. Brandon calls for a worldwide revival spanning nations such as America, Canada, Australia, the Philippines, South Korea, and China. He specifically discusses Christian leaders and ministries, including those of Andrew Wommack, John Hagee, Billy Burke, and Rodney Howard-Browne, foreseeing their physical preservation and the continuous expansion of their influence.

MIDDLE EAST DYNAMICS AND MIGRATION: Brandon describes a future of immense agricultural and financial blessings for Israel, predicting fountains of new wealth and resources springing from the land. He warns that as Israel conducts military strikes against Iranian infrastructure, global anti-Semitism will reach unprecedented levels between 2026 and 2028. According to Brandon, this persecution will trigger a massive migration of Jewish people from around the world back to Israel. He describes seeing visions of protests, fires, and unrest in cities with large Jewish populations, such as New York, which will act as a catalyst for this mass relocation.

PUBLIC FIGURES AND CULTURAL INFLUENCES: Brandon addresses Elon Musk, disputing Musk's playful claims of being an alien and instead asserting that Musk is backed by Nephilim spirits that provide him with advanced wisdom. Brandon commits to praying for Musk's conversion to Christianity, expressing a desire for his influence to be redirected toward spiritual purposes. He concludes by reiterating the necessity for individuals to recognize the signs of the times and prepare for the significant societal and global transformations that are about to unfold.
rawData: [February 02, 2026]-[Praying over the protection of investigative reporters]-[https://youtu.be/whNsPmzslac]-[All right. Good morning, everybody. Thank you for joining us again today. I did a video last night and I didn't like the way it flowed too well. So I told Braden, "I want to do a new video today and we're going to pray more instead of talking so much." I just want to go over some of the things that the Lord showed us yesterday in prayer. This is what's amazing: while we were praying—during that two-hour prayer time—the Lord was showing us Benny Johnson. He released a video within that hour of the exact same thing that we were praying over for his protection, for his family, for his children, and all the things the Lord was showing us. Then about the other person—who is the other person? Nick Shirley. So, we're going to pray over Nick Shirley again today and we're going to pray over Benny Johnson. This is amazing. He released this video of all the fraud and investigative reporting he was doing, reporting all the things that were just so bad about California yesterday. And I thought, "Isn't that amazing?" But that's what the Lord was showing us in the spirit. To me, it was just a pat on the back—not a pat on the back, but a moment when the Lord loves on you. He's just saying, "Hey, you're going the right direction." So, all glory to Jesus. We always start out the broadcast by telling you that everything we see and everything we do on this channel is all to the glory of God. It's none of us and all of Him. We decrease, He increases every single time. I want to tell you that we yield to the anointing of the prophetic. We yield to it, and I thank You, Lord, that You flow through this broadcast today. Father, let Your name be great. We give You all the glory, honor, and praise, uninterrupted and unhindered by any satanic or demonic force. We apply the blood of Jesus over this broadcast and over anything that You want to show us. If not, Father, we would just pray for the things that You already have. And we give You all the glory, honor, and praise for everything that You do through this channel, everything You will continue to do in the future, and everything You've done in the past. Father, we give You the glory, the honor, and the praise. And we thank You, Father, for Your divine protection over this land and for Your divine protection over our president today. We lift him up before You, Father, and we thank You, Lord, in the name of Jesus. I was just getting right into prayer, wasn't I? Was there anything else we wanted to see? Oh, the Valley of Decision where we are. The Lord spoke to me early this morning and He said to me, "Brandon, this is a very important week concerning President Trump's term. This is the week. This is the Valley of Decision." The decisions he makes this week—even last week—the Lord said the two weeks going into this timeframe of the 3rd (tomorrow is the 3rd, today is the 2nd, Groundhog Day). This is the timeframe the Lord warned us about as they call for meetings in Turkey this week with Iran. They're wanting to have these meetings and make the decisions of "pushing the button" concerning Iran, concerning liberating the people of Iran, and doing the things that we're praying lead to major revival. This is about the finances of the nations as we see China today saying that there's some kind of coup going on in their military. Did you see that article? I found that this morning early while I was praying and texted it to you. Can you show the title of that so they can see it better? See, this is what we saw, and they're saying it now on Fox. What was the purpose of this? To bring a hedge of protection over Taiwan to give them more time for revival in the land of Asia going through China, South Korea, and North Korea, and to bring confusion into the regime of China in the days ahead. The Lord said, "I'm going to bring a major wave of My presence and there will be a shaking in China." He said it will start with the military and they will try to oust Xi Jinping in the days ahead. They'll try to get him out and bring in a new government because there will be so much confusion and chaos in the Chinese government. There will be major financial shakings in China. We're seeing it now: "China's Xi has lost complete control over China's military." I thought that's what the Lord was showing us. Two weeks now we've been praying over this because the Lord said, "I want to bring a revival." That's what I'm trying to tell you all. Do you realize where we are with the signs of the times of the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ? Or do you have your head in the sand? If you are thinking that Jesus is coming back later rather than sooner, you're missing it. Right now, we have an opportunity for a major revival across this world. It's happening—a stirring. What did the Lord say 2026 would start out to be? He said it would be a political theater—a lot of drama in 2026 concerning political things for a "shaking to awaken." First Corinthians 5:5, He said, would begin in the house of the Lord, for there is great corruption in My church. People say I yell too much, so I'm going to try not to yell. But it's just my voice; it carries. You can hear me. If I talk in Walmart and my kids are in there, they say, "Daddy, we can hear you across the whole store." It's just my voice. It carries a long way. I don't have to have a microphone. You can hear me across the auditorium, and if I'm yelling, it's really going to carry across a football field. But it is what it is. So here we see that "Trump Iran reportedly prepares to talk in Turkey." This is it: the Valley of Decision concerning the Fed, concerning this week, and concerning how we handle Israel. This is all pointing into a major revival. This is all coming to a head concerning Cuba and the finances of America as we saw silver tank like a lead balloon this weekend. I think gold even fell. We see all these major shakings in the financial sector. Then we see the UN. Did you show them the UN article? "UN faces imminent financial collapse." They're not paying their bills. It's kind of interesting. I know that Donné Clement Petruska was saying that her daddy said—all the shakings in the UN, all the prophetic words that Kim gave before he went home to be with the Lord—we're seeing those words come to pass. They're happening right now. He gave those 15 or 20 years ago, and those words are starting to manifest right in front of our faces. The escalation of things is at an all-time high. Every day I wake up, I have such an urgency in my spirit to do corporate prayer with you all. We take this seriously; we know who we are in Christ. We take our authority and we don't just sit back idly and say, "Whatever will be, will be." We steer the ship in prayer. We can steer this thing in prayer by who we are. As He is, so are we in this world. That's why I keep drilling this and telling you all that you have the ability as sons and daughters of the Most High God to change things through the power of prayer. Don't allow the enemy to try to tell you that you're just a weak, good-for-nothing, whatever. No, I'm a child of the King. I'm created in His image. We can do all things through Christ who strengthens me. Greater is He that is in us than he that is in the world. A thousand shall fall at our side and 10,000 at our right hand, but nothing shall come nigh me. You either believe it or you don't. And if you're a believing believer that has a backbone like a crowbar, you're going to be willing, and we are able. He is able. He has made us able to take the land. And I believe the best is yet to come. Yes, we see the valley of decision and we know what the Lord told us concerning President Trump and his life. The Lord Jesus stood right here and He told me the decisions he makes in the next couple weeks will be the make or break of his presidency. I took it when He said that. He said, 'I will hold the church accountable for how they prayed for him.' It's our job as a church to pray for our president. I had so many people say, 'Well, why would you pray for him? Let him go. We'll get somebody else who's better.' Are you kidding me? We have a lot of ignorant people in this world. It's our job to pray. I believe with all my heart that God has appointed President Trump for such a time as this. And we will protect him with prayer, and he will live long and finish his assignment that God has called him to do. I don't believe there is a better person for the job. I don't. But the Lord said it will be an open door of pride that would do this. This would be an open door to kill, steal, and destroy the things the Lord has told him to do to go on the right side. The enemy is waiting in the trenches saying, 'Listen, how do we take him out of his path? What opens the door? Disobedience opens doors. Pride opens doors.' There's lots of things that will try to open the door. Is it always just about death? No. It's even impeachment—not having the right red wave in November and having an impeachment in 2027 or 2028 because of losing the Senate and the House. There's a lot here and there's a lot to lose. The church needs to wake up and we have a revival. The only thing that's going to save America is an awakening unto God. The Lord said, 'They have put their eyes on Trump as the savior of America, Brandon. And I'm the only one that will save America.' A revival is the only thing. I've given you a reprieve. What will you do with this reprieve? But even with this reprieve, the valley of decision and the decisions he makes as the head of this nation, as basically the leader of the free world—what makes or breaks the world is how America goes and how Israel goes. And this is all what's happening. I want to show you this clip from Lindsey Graham today. Now, I don't necessarily agree with everything this man always says, but I agreed with what he said here. I believe this is the book. Play that right now and then we'll go right to prayer. We're going to take communion. We're going to pray. But this is interesting what he says. 'If this regime is still standing the day after, if we put years of chaos, I have every confidence that President Trump will do what he promised to the people. Help is on the way. Keep protesting. If this regime falls, Hamas, Hezbollah, the Houthis, they all go. It'd be the biggest change since the fall of the Berlin Wall. But here's one thing I know: Donald Trump is Ronald Reagan plus, in my mind, Venezuela and soon Cuba. The one thing you can't do as president: talk like Reagan and act like Obama. There's no deal to be done here. These people are not trustworthy. The protesters in the street are not protesting for a better nuclear deal. They're protesting for a better life. And if they win the day, we have a chance to have friends with the people of Iran. The Ayatollah will never be our friend. He's a religious Nazi. President Trump, you said help is on the way. That has to be real. It has to be real soon. Do it, Mr. President. The people of Iran are begging you to be on their side. You have done it so well. You are Reagan plus. This is the defining moment in your presidency. Stand by the people. The Ayatollah falls. The region changes bigger than the fall of the Berlin Wall. No more international terrorists. This regime has American blood on its hands since 1979. You got the Houthis, you got Hezbollah killing Americans. Bring this regime down because the people want it down. You don't have to invade the country. But help on the way means military strikes against the infrastructure that is killing the Iranian people. Go after the ones who are killing the people. Put this regime on notice. We're never going to let up. Strangle their economy. It will fall. The people will take over. And over time, we will have a friend in Iran, not an enemy. Hezbollah, Hamas, the Houthis, all fall. The biggest thing you could possibly ever do to the Middle East is take this regime down. And they're as weak as they've ever been since 1979. Mr. President, you can do it. I hope you will do it. And if you do, this is Reagan plus.' Okay. So, do you remember every time I told you I saw Reagan divided in his face? Trump was on half. Reagan was on half. And I saw the Berlin Wall. And this was the defining moment every single time. I told Braden, 'This is exactly what I saw in the spirit. This was a Reagan moment.' We've prayed over this since this time last year. We've been praying since he first got into power. And the Lord said he will be like a Reagan. He will bring the wall down. And I saw, 'Bring that wall down.' And I heard, 'Gorbachev, bring that wall down.' I heard Ronald Reagan speaking through Trump, which I thought was interesting. And then Lindsey Graham is saying the exact same thing I saw in the spirit, but he's saying it in the natural. Isn't that powerful what he just said? Because that's what I saw about Ronald Reagan. And then I saw liberation coming to Cuba. I saw he would be a person that would go into Cuba and free the Cuban people to have freedom of religion to do the things that they needed to do because they were underneath a dictator. The same with Kim Jong-un—that the days of Kim Jong-un are coming to an end. The Lord said, 'I'm getting rid of the Pillsbury Doughboy.' You say, 'Well, I don't believe He talks that way.' He talks that way to me. It's a personal relationship with me. God talks to you how He wants to talk to you. He talks to me like a friend. He's going to get rid of Kim Jong-un. He's going to get rid of his sister. He said, 'I'm getting rid of the tyrants, and there will be a great revival in North Korea.' That will be a small window because the military will try to rein it in. There'll be shaking in China. There'll be shaking. And He said, 'Pray a dome of protection over Taiwan because in the days ahead, they'll try to take the land.' But if you hold it back, you can hold things back through prayer. You don't realize who you are, church. You don't realize the authority that you have. You don't realize what God has given you as a child of the Most High God. Do you want to hear that? Do you want to play it, son? When was this clip? Well, I think you talked about it again, but this is July, though I think the original one was around April. This is July. I played this. Good job, son, you found it. Just play it. Several more: escalate war. He wants peace. He was saying—and that's whenever I saw, if you go back several more videos—I saw the Berlin Wall. I saw the Berlin Wall, and I saw it was in Germany. I heard and I saw half of Trump's face and half of Ronald Reagan's face, and I heard, 'Bring down that wall,' 'that Iron Curtain of communism,' and things like that. It was like a type and shadow as Trump was operating in his presidency like a Ronald Reagan. And that's when I was seeing the Cold War. I was seeing the darkness of Cuba. And the Lord said, 'Pay attention to Cuba.' He keeps bringing up Cuba over and over again. Even in this last video, I saw Cuba and it was highlighted again, but it was completely dark. It's pretty amazing because the Lord's saying it now. He has a choice to make in this valley of decision. Will you follow through, sir, with what God has called you to do? Or will you allow corrupt communication, the counsel of the ungodly, to sway you from what God has called you to do? And that's what the Lord is saying to you. He said, 'Brandon, that was that devil that I saw in the Oval Office that was pecking at his brain.' It's counsel from ungodly people that is swaying his mind. He knows what the Lord is telling him to do, but there's demonic principality spirits that are trying to be a storm over the White House. I saw these demonic influences picking and poking at his brain, causing confusion. And if everybody remembers that octopus-looking spirit that was trying to latch around their minds, that was bringing a corruption over their mind like a fog; and the Lord said, 'This is a demonic spirit.' It looked like some kind of aquatic demonic spirit. And so that's what we're going to pray for this week. I don't understand it all. You know, we see in part, we hear in part as to what God shows us. We don't get it all at the same time. It's not about us; it's about Him. It's so that we deflect the glory always to our Father. It isn't about bringing light to Brandon Biggs or to my family; it's always to show how good God is and that He would speak to His people and tell them how to pray for the nation because He loves us so much. This is all about how much Jesus Christ loves you and how much He died for you. He shed His blood for you. He made a way for you to walk in victory. But it's your choice to receive it and walk in it. He's a gentleman. He doesn't force you to do anything. He's always there, an ever-present help in a time of need. But it's your job to receive everything He's given you by faith. I will walk in the victory that Jesus has for me. I walk in that just like I tell you all the time. It's my choice. I yield to the anointing of the prophetic. I yield to the anointing of the watchmen. I yield to it. It's your choice. So, whatever God has for you, it's your choice to yield to it. He may have called you to be the greatest school teacher that there ever was, or a mechanic, or a cook, or a businessman or woman. I don't know. All I know is that God has called us to do something, and it's to do something all to His glory and to be great in what we do. We're children of the most high God. And I believe it's time for us to be that backbone like a crowbar and to be victorious in these last days. So, I'm so thankful for all of you that have joined me at this different hour. I know right now I usually don't do videos at this time, but I felt in my heart to come on here this morning later and pray with you with a different crowd. We're hitting different crowds because there's different parts of the world that have never seen us live. We usually just do them at night. And so I'm doing some things differently now. So let's do some prayer and let's take communion together, and let's believe God for this valley of decision that we're walking through this week with our President going into the State of the Union in a couple weeks. I believe it's in three weeks. We are praying over the Olympics this week and the Super Bowl, praying over what the Lord showed us about this protest, that they would cause a distraction—a reaction to a distraction. Think about it. He said because of the Epstein list and the things that were being exposed from these elitists, from these Illuminati, these dark people, the Lord said they would cause a distraction from all what is going on with this reaction. They would have a sleight of hand in the days ahead because there'll be darker and more embarrassing things that will come out from a new Edward Snowden in the days ahead. The Lord spoke to us specifically that it would be Anonymous. And he said Anonymous will release—there'll be a hacker group that will hack into and release even greater secrets for a ransom. They won't get their ransom, so they'll release embarrassing moments from the Democratic Party and sports people and things like that. And the Lord said these would be highly embarrassing moments. And it goes alongside what Prophet Kim Clement said—or what Kim Clement saw—highly embarrassing moments. And the Lord showed us more detail into what Kim was seeing how many years ago. The word of the Lord doesn't die. So he sees in part and hears in part back when he was alive, and the Lord raised up new people to take the baton and keep exposing and speaking it forth. How many times did the Lord call people to speak forth words saying that His Son was coming the first time? It didn't come through just one prophetic voice; He spoke it through many. So whenever He's coming back the second time, He doesn't just speak it through one prophetic voice; He speaks it through many. He's coming. Jesus is coming. It's time to get your house in order. It's time to get ready. You're running out of time. He's standing at the door right now, waiting for His Father's instructions. The Bible says that no man knows the day or the hour of when the Son of Man returns, but we know the signs of the times are all around us. And we see the ripening of the fig tree. It's all happening in front of us right now as we speak. But most people have their head in the sand and they don't see it. As in the days of Noah, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. Look at what they were like in the days of Noah in the Bible and what He tells us in the book of Genesis. Countless times Noah was always telling them, 'There's a flood coming. There's a flood coming. You need to get ready.' They laughed at him and scoffed at him because there was never rain. But I hear the sound of an abundance of rain. I can hear it in the distance. And the Lord said, 'I'm not going to judge this world again by flood; it'll be by fire next time.' I'm telling you by the spirit of God, ladies and gentlemen, it's time to get your house in order. There's voices crying in the wilderness. There's a voice crying just like John the Baptist said. He said it: there's one coming. He came. He dwells on the inside of us. But guess what? He said He would baptize you with the Holy Ghost and fire. It's time for you to accept the Lord Jesus Christ and get your house in order. You're running out of time. As we watch the signs of the times all around us, I hope you feel an urgency. Are you that frog in a pot, and the water and the temperature is getting hotter and hotter and it's getting ready to boil? And there's many of you that don't realize how close you are to destruction. I pray today you find my friend. I pray today that if you're here right now and you've never accepted the Lord Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal savior, and you're here and you're watching me and you're saying, 'Who is this guy?' I'm just a guy, a voice crying in the wilderness. It's not about me. It's about me telling you that Jesus Christ is coming. And if you're here today and you've never accepted Jesus Christ—out of the 4,900 people that are watching—and you've never accepted my friend Jesus, you say, "Well, I've heard a lot about him. Grandma used to tell me about it in Bible stories," but I'm here just because I want to hear what the bald-headed guy says is coming next. I don't know what Jesus will show us today. I don't control the gift; he's in control of it. But I'm sure he might show us something. The most important thing is not being here to try to entertain you for what's coming, but to tell you so you'll pray. The most important thing is that you accept Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior. And if you're here right now and you've never accepted him, if you've never confessed him as your Lord, it's time. It's appointed unto man once to die, and after that the judgment. If you're here today and you've never confessed Jesus Christ as your Lord, today's your day. You may not have another opportunity to accept him. Today might be your last day on this earth. You could watch this broadcast, click out of it, and have a tragic car accident on the way to where you're supposed to be going, or the very shoes you put on today to go to work—the undertaker might be taking them off that night. No one's promised tomorrow. Today is the day of salvation. So I want to ask you today: you may know a lot about Jesus, but does he know you? If you were to die today, where would you spend eternity? The most important thing that I will ever tell you is that the time is running out and the ark door is closing. It's just like the days of Noah. He's standing at the door. I'm telling you, I've seen him countless times. But as I am here right now, you have the opportunity to accept my friend. I want to present this to you right now, and I want you to search your heart. Am I talking to you? Is Jesus at your door knocking at your heart? He's there right now. He's saying, "Will you follow me? Will you allow me to be your friend? Will you allow me to give you a new future, a new path, a new hope?" It's your choice. As you're watching this video right now—I don't know what time you're watching it, you could be watching the replay—but last video we had 87 salvations. There were 87 new people that came to the Lord Jesus Christ through this channel. We give all the glory to God, and we're so thankful for every single one of you. But I believe we're throwing out that net again. Will you accept Jesus? Jesus died for you publicly, and I want you to be public about your decision right now. If you're here right now and you've never had an experience with the Lord Jesus, or you used to be on fire for the Lord, but the very people that you went away from... you used to be in sin, you used to be in the party scene, the drug scene, the sex scene, whatever. And the very thing you said you repented of, you went back to. And just like the prodigal son or the prodigal daughter, whoever you may be, you're in that pigpen right now and you're sitting there looking at yourself and you say, "What have I become? What have I done with my life? I used to be on fire. I used to be so sold out to the Lord." But in the process of life, I became weary and well-doing, and I gave my thoughts and my mind back over to reprobate thinking. And today I want to make a fresh, clean start. He's never left you and he's never forsaken you. You turned your back on him; he didn't turn his back on you. He's there with the robe. He's there saying, "Let's kill the fatted calf. My son, my daughter's coming home today." But you have to make a decision to come home. And the moment you do, he's there waiting for you. He loves you. He's never turned his back. Like I said, he's never said, "You know what? I don't really care about them anymore." He's always been that ever-present help. He's wanting to say, "Hey, will you just give me a chance to make your mess into a message?" I want to do it. I want to change your life, but you've got to let me in. I want to take all those chains of iron and all that baggage off of you, and I want to give you a fresh, clean day today. You're not here by coincidence; you're here by divine appointment. I believe it. So, I want to say a simple prayer for you, but I want you to be bold in your decision today in the comment section. And I want you to say today, "I'm coming home, and I want to give the Lord a chance. I want to become born again. I want to ask the Lord to forgive me. I want to basically sell out. I want to just be all in." So right now, if I'm talking to you and you feel that stirring on the inside of you, if you feel that knocking on your heart, will you just allow the Lord to help you? Take all the pride out of it. Don't go to hell for pride. Today's your day. So, I'm going to say a simple prayer right now. Say, "Jesus, I believe you're the son of God. I believe that you died for me and you rose again on the third day. Jesus, I'm a sinner and I need a savior. I ask you, God, to forgive me of my sins, Lord. I used to be on fire for you. I used to be sold out to you, but I've let the world back in and I've messed up. From this day forward, Lord, I turn my back on the world. I turn my back on the devil. I turn my back on my sin. And Jesus, I ask you to give me a fresh, clean start today. I sell out to you, Lord. From this day forward, I'll serve you with all my heart. I ask you to write my name in the Lamb's Book of Life. Thank you, Lord, that I'm free from sin. Thank you, Lord, that I'm born again. I love you, Lord, and I thank you, Lord, that you've invited me into your kingdom today. As I confess my sins, you are faithful and just to forgive me of my sins and cleanse me of all unrighteousness. Today I'm saved. Today I'm born again, Lord. And I will serve you from this day forward in the name of Jesus. Amen and amen." I believe if you just said that prayer, I believe you just gave your heart to Jesus. It was a simple prayer, but with the mouth confession is made and with the heart unto salvation. You've got to confess it with your mouth and you've got to believe in your heart. That's it. So, if you just did that, what do you do next? You find a Bible-believing church. You tell them, "I just got born again watching some guy on YouTube, and I need to be water-baptized. Will you help me?" And I'm sure they'll help you. Find a Bible. A non-denominational church is where I would go—one that believes in the baptism of the Holy Ghost. You need to get baptized in the Holy Ghost, speaking with tongues, and you get radically on fire for Jesus. And I'm telling you, "this little light of mine, I'm going to let it shine" will become an inferno. And people will be attracted to you from all over.
